content: lib/  Table of contents This directory contains the standard library aka COPBL or the Community Open Promise Body Library. The bodies and bundles found here are contributed and maintained by the CFEngine community. They codify many common and useful patterns. This directories contents are expected to be found in the following locations: $(sys.libdir) $(sys.local_libdir) (relative to the root of your policy inputs)
